article.body_preview:
DHAKA, May 13, 2023 (BSS) - Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina today called upon the engineers, key-force of the country's development, to uphold Bangladesh's existing development spree.

"The trend of development of Bangladesh has to be continued and it's my only expectation to you (engineers). . . InshAllah, none could stop the development journey of Bangladesh," she said while addressing the inaugural ceremony of the 60th convention of the Institution of Engineers, Bangladesh (IEB) as the chief gue

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina said Bangladesh will not purchase anything from any country if it imposes sanctions.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote states a national policy that Bangladesh 'will not purchase anything from any country' imposing sanctions, which directly pertains to the country-wide volume of goods brought in (imports).

verification.quote_best_match: Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina said Bangladesh will not purchase anything from any country if it imposes sanctions.
verification.judge_reasoning: The exact quote appears and explicitly states that if a country imposes sanctions, Bangladesh will not purchase anything from it, implying halted imports from those countries at the national level.
